# openai_project (Data Source)

Look up a project by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_project" "example" {
  project_id = "proj_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) project id

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (Number) archived at
- `created_at` (Number) created at
- `external_key_id` (String) external key id
- `id` (String) id
- `name` (String) name
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.
- `status` (String) status
